_comment: Example manifest for Thinkorswim Momentum Intelligence parity fixtures. Copy to manifest.json and replace the example values with real ToS / MacMarket observations or exports. Do not commit fabricated parity values. ToS does not export the Momentum study rows or usable bars CSVs, so 'visual_attestation' (no-bars manual ToS-vs-MM) is the practical default. See README.md and docs/thinkorswim-momentum-parity.md for the full workflow.

fixtures._comment: EXAMPLE — visual_attestation mode. No bars_csv or study_csv is required. Operator records ToS rendered chart values AND MacMarket rendered chart values from screenshots, optional OHLC price context (so apples-to-apples comparisons are explicit), and the MM composite score breakdown when it is visible on the MM chart. Default close tolerance is 0.10; override via tolerances.close. Set strict_price_context: true to make a close-price mismatch flip the fixture to visual_failed; default is false (price mismatch reports as a warning only). Replace placeholder numbers and screenshot paths with real captures before relying on the parity report.
fixtures.name: SPY_1D_visual_attestation_example
fixtures.screenshot_notes: Placeholder reference only — capture both rendered charts cropped to the True Momentum Score panel.
fixtures.notes: Placeholder visual attestation. Replace ToS and MM values with the actual numbers read off the rendered chart labels.

fixtures._comment: EXAMPLE — visual_observation mode (operator reads ToS chart only and MacMarket computes its side from bars_csv). Still supported. Use this when a bars CSV is available; prefer visual_attestation otherwise.
fixtures.name: XLK_1D_visual_sample
fixtures.screenshot_notes: Cropped to the True Momentum Score panel — placeholder reference only.
fixtures.notes: Placeholder visual observation. Replace with real values transcribed from the ToS chart labels for the bar dated observed_bar_date.

fixtures._comment: EXAMPLE — exported_study_csv fixtures remain supported for any operator who can capture the ToS study output (e.g. via a third-party study exporter). Replace expected_latest with the values from the last row of the study CSV.
fixtures.name: XLK_1D_exported_csv_sample
fixtures.notes: Example only. Replace numbers with real Thinkorswim study values before relying on the parity report.
